name: Disco / GenTabs
summary: Disco and GenTabs are browser-based experiments that transform open tabs into structured, task-specific mini-apps using AI.
whyItMatters: These experiments reimagine web browsing as an active, generative process. Instead of managing tabs manually, users can turn information clusters into purpose-built applications.
likelyEvolution: May evolve into a new form of AI-assisted browsing or task management within Chrome or Search.
